name: Funding Readiness Framework
purpose: Assess whether a project is prepared to research and pursue suitable financing, grant, contracting, or bootstrap pathways without promising approval.
questionsToAsk: What will the funds pay for?
Which pathway matches the use of funds and business maturity?
What is the total cost and risk of the proposed capital?
scoringModel: Score plan completeness, projections, owner contribution, credit readiness, collateral readiness, proof strength, revenue evidence, research quality, use-of-funds clarity, and entity readiness.
Match pathways conservatively and explain uncertainty.
Use official program links before suggesting an application.
Do not rank venture capital highly for businesses that do not fit venture economics.
qualityChecks: Include SBA loan pathways where relevant.
Include CDFI, community-bank, credit-union, state, local, contracting, equipment-finance, and bootstrap research paths.
State that final eligibility belongs to the lender or program.
warnings: VentureForge does not guarantee loans, grants, contracting awards, or investment.
Compare terms and verify official eligibility before applying.
